Bash(node -e "const en=require\('./en.json'\); const fr=require\('./fr.json'\); const countKeys=\(o,p=''\)=>{let c=0;for\(const k in o\){if\(typeof o[k]==='object'&&o[k]!==null\)c+=countKeys\(o[k],p+k+'.'\);else c++;}return c;}; console.log\('EN keys:', countKeys\(en\)\); console.log\('FR keys:', countKeys\(fr\)\); const enK=new Set\(\); const frK=new Set\(\); const collect=\(o,p='',s\)=>{for\(const k in o\){if\(typeof o[k]==='object'&&o[k]!==null\)collect\(o[k],p+k+'.',s\);else s.add\(p+k\);}}; collect\(en,'',enK\); collect\(fr,'',frK\); const missing=[...enK].filter\(k=>!frK.has\(k\)\); console.log\('Missing in FR:', missing.length\); if\(missing.length>0\)console.log\('  First 10:', missing.slice\(0,10\)\);")
